name: samir-portfolio
description: AI-powered portfolio for Samir Bajagain — Civil Engineer | Entrepreneur | Creative Professional

scripts.dev: start "Server" cmd /c "cd server && npm run dev" && start "Client" cmd /c "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.clean: rmdir /s /q client/dist && rmdir /s /q client/node_modules && rmdir /s /q server/node_modules

author: Samir Bajagain
